prior_actions: CAPA-2023-001 (tip bonding improvement) closed and verified effective. FSCA-2023-001 initiated and completed. No open corrective actions carried forward.
complaint_summary: 12 complaints received in 2023. 3 serious (2 tip detachments, 1 pressure failure). Complaint rate 0.008 per 1000 units sold. All investigated and closed.
trend_data: Tip detachment rate declined following FSCA-2023-001 field action. No new trends identified in Q4 2023.
sales_data: 1,580 units sold in 2023 across EU and UK markets.
notified_body_review: Periodic surveillance audit conducted by BSI NB 2797 in October 2023. No major non-conformities raised.
sections: 1. Device and Manufacturer Details; 2. PMS Activities Summary; 3. Complaint Analysis; 4. Serious Incident Analysis; 5. FSCA Summary; 6. CAPA Status; 7. Benefit-Risk Conclusion; 8. Conclusions and Forward Actions
